Replace deprecated ILoggingEvent.getMarker() with getMarkerList() to comply with SLF4J API changes in newer versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: ILoggingEvent.getMarker() is deprecated and may be removed or behave differently in newer SLF4J versions compatible with JDK 21; using getMarkerList() ensures compatibility with the current marker handling logic.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Rename constant SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better naming consistency.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for local variable type inference.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson imports to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException and com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper are no longer available or are deprecated in favor of the tools.jackson package in the updated dependency tree, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the method signature to throw the new Jackson exception class instead of the old one.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method previously threw JsonProcessingException which is no longer the correct type in the tools.jackson package; it must throw JacksonException to match the new API contract.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declarations with var for local variables to modernize the code style.
Remove deprecated @EnableWebSecurity annotation in favor of the default behavior in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The @EnableWebSecurity annotation is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error or is ignored, and explicit removal is required for clean migration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity configuration to use the new lambda DSL and withDefaults() for CORS.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old method signatures for configuring security features (like cors()) are removed or deprecated in Spring Security 6; the new lambda-based API is required.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update frameOptions configuration to use the new FrameOptionsConfig lambda style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old frameOptions() method signature is removed in Spring Security 6; the new lambda-based API is required.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Rename permissionsPolicy to permissionsPolicyHeader to match Spring Security 6 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method permissionsPolicy() is removed in Spring Security 6; it has been renamed to permissionsPolicyHeader().

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update oauth2ResourceServer configuration to use withDefaults() for JWT.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old oauth2ResourceServer().jwt() method signature is removed in Spring Security 6; the new lambda-based API with withDefaults() is required.
